requirements.jd_requirement: Build and maintain secure applications and infrastructure
requirements.evidence: I build and operate production security systems — not just prototypes — with a focus on deployable controls and measurable risk reduction.
I automate high-friction workflows with Python and PowerShell, building CI/CD-oriented tooling that teams can run and maintain.

requirements.jd_requirement: Work with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP)
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management
requirements.evidence: I deliver containerized services and internal tools in cloud environments, designing with operational realities like secrets handling and access control.

requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows
requirements.evidence: I build automated release workflows and infrastructure-as-code that embed security without slowing delivery.

requirements.jd_requirement: Collaborate across engineering, infrastructure, and security teams
requirements.evidence: I work well across security, infrastructure, and engineering — translating requirements into controls and documenting guardrails so delivery scales.

requirements.jd_requirement: Use data to drive security decisions
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Entity resolution, Asset reconciliation
requirements.evidence: I integrate fragmented data sources and reconcile drift to produce actionable visibility — turning noise into reliable asset inventories and risk signals.

requirements.jd_requirement: Leverage AI/ML responsibly in security tooling
requirements.matched_skills: RAG pipelines, LangChain, LLM developer tooling
requirements.evidence: I use AI where it improves workflow quality and speed — with strong emphasis on auditability, safety, and operational governance.

tone_notes: Match GuidePoint’s pragmatic, mission-driven tone: avoid hype, emphasize operational reliability and real-world deployment. Use phrases like 'deployable controls', 'hold up in production', and 'reduce manual effort' to align with their engineering-first culture.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds and operates production-grade tooling — bridging security, automation, and cloud delivery to reduce risk through reliable, maintainable systems.
